name: Android APK Build

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 45

    steps:
      - name: Kodu çek
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Java 17 kur
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Node.js kur
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Bağımlılıkları yükle
        run: npm install

      - name: Web dosyalarını www/ klasörüne kopyala
        run: |
          mkdir -p www
          cp index.html www/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp -r css www/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp -r js www/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp -r assets www/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp manifest.json www/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp firebase-messaging-sw.js www/ 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Uygulama ikonlarını oluştur
        run: |
          pip install Pillow -q
          python3 icon_gen.py

      - name: google-services.json oluştur
        env:
          GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON }}
        run: |
          echo "$GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON" > android/app/google-services.json

      - name: Keystore oluştur
        run: |
          keytool -genkey -v \
            -keystore android/app/koruk-okul.jks \
            -alias koruk \
            -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 \
            -storepass korukokul2024 \
            -keypass korukokul2024 \
            -dname "CN=Koruk Okul,OU=Okul,O=Koruk,L=Ankara,ST=Ankara,C=TR"

      - name: Capacitor sync
        run: npx cap sync android

      - name: Gradle wrapper oluştur
        run: |
          cd android
          gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.7

      - name: Gradle izni ver
        run: chmod +x android/gradlew

      - name: Release APK derle
        working-directory: android
        env:
          KEYSTORE_PATH: app/koruk-okul.jks
          KEYSTORE_PASSWORD: korukokul2024
          KEY_ALIAS: koruk
          KEY_PASSWORD: korukokul2024
        run: ./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon --stacktrace

      - name: APK artifacts olarak yükle
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: koruk-okul-apk
          path: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk
          retention-days: 90
